title: lygodesmia pauciflora
intro: Lygodesmia pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered skeleton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lygodesmia pauciflora are said to include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lygodesmia pauciflora typically involve making teas or infusions from its roots or leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
